title: Prediction of BLEVE-induced response of road tunnel using Transformer network with modified self-attention (SAMT)
search_query: Prediction of BLEVE-induced response of road tunnel using Transformer network with modified self-attention (SAMT)
notes: Road tunnels might be exposed to Boiling Liquid Expansion Vapor Explosion (BLEVE) due to the transportation of liquified gas tankers passing through road tunnels. An efficient and accurate prediction of the response of road tunnels under internal BLEVEs can facilitate the reliabl...
